contract_purpose: Line-ranged evidence pointers for canonical architecture FACT claims and capability ownership derivation.

entries.claim: Governance root defines non-negotiable ISA governance principles used as highest precedence.
AGENT_MAP marks canonical chain and execution registry location.
ISA core contract defines exactly six canonical capabilities and ownership rule.
Top-level appRouter surfaces are declared in server/routers.ts.
Shared platform surfaces are declared in appRouter and assigned in capability manifest.
Supplemental ESRS architecture file is explicitly non-canonical for system CURRENT/TARGET.
As-built dependency graph source exists at docs/evidence/EXEC_GRAPH.mmd.
Conflict register declares itself as single canonical conflict location.
Client route entrypoint file exists at client/src/App.tsx.

Observability contract check reports pass with runtime-scoped coverage meeting threshold.
Security gate reports pass under deterministic timeout-fail semantics with critical-severity blocking policy.
Aggregate weighted confidence is 1.00 with DONE threshold set to 0.75.
Canonical doc-code validator passes in canonical-only mode.
Canonical docs allowlist pass is based on forbidden tracked file checks; untracked local noise is warning-only.
Capability manifest is authoritative ownership contract with capability sections.
Capability graph contains machine-readable overlap/gap coverage validation.
Shared platform router ownership is explicitly represented in capability manifest.
Primary table definitions are declared in drizzle/schema.ts via mysqlTable exports.
Supplemental table definitions are declared in drizzle/schema_corpus_governance.ts via mysqlTable exports.
Tiered CI policy is defined in .github/workflows/tiered-tests.yml.
Manifest ownership drift check reports pass with full router/table ownership coverage and no duplicates.
